name: Grilled Lime Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chicken in a shallow baking dish.
2. Add the chicken, turning to coat evenly. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for 1 day.
3. Remove the chicken from the marinade, reserving it for basting.
4. Coat the grill rack with Pam cooking spray.
5. Place the rack on the grill over medium heat coals.
6. Place the chicken on the rack.
7. Cook for 5 minutes on each side or until done, basting with the reserved marinade.
PER SERVING: 146 calories, 25.8 g protein, 2.9 g fat, 2.4 g carbohydrates
70 g cholesterol, 1.2 mg iron, 64 mg sodium, 21 mg calcium.
